name: 1PhoneMirror
description: 1PhoneMirror is a Windows-based screen-mirroring receiver designed for Intune admins to capture consistent, framed mobile-device screens for documentation and training. It supports iOS/macOS AirPlay with optional PIN, Android wireless debugging via bundled adb/scrcpy, and experimental Miracast, delivering one-click screenshots or MP4/GIF recordings inside a device frame. Multiple devices can stay paired and be switched from a bottom bezel, with no app installations on phones.
author: Simon Skotheimsvik

securityCheck.aiSummary: Overall: No malware-like patterns detected. Primary concerns are telemetry data exfiltration and the anonymous download redirect endpoint. Recommend auditing telemetry scope and privacy controls, tightening input validation and access controls for downloads, and using HTTPS for timestamping where applicable.
